raw_response:
```json
{
  "communicative_function": "The statement advises on the power of suggestion and communication by medical professionals in influencing patient outcomes.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Doctors have authority and influence over their patients through their title and words.",
    "Suggestion can impact health outcomes either positively or negatively.",
    "The mindset of the patient can influence their health and recovery."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement is coherent as it effectively illustrates the impact of medical advice on patient psychology, aligning with the overall theme of self-mastery and autosuggestion presented in the book.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The effectiveness of the statement depends on the acceptance of the theory that psychological influence can positively affect health outcomes and that medical professionals can leverage this through positive communication.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If it were proven that psychological influence has negligible impact on physical health, the statement could be misleading by overemphasizing the role of suggestion in medical recovery."
}
```

parsed_json.communicative_function: The statement advises on the power of suggestion and communication by medical professionals in influencing patient outcomes.
implicit_claims: Doctors have authority and influence over their patients through their title and words.
Suggestion can impact health outcomes either positively or negatively.
The mindset of the patient can influence their health and recovery.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: The statement is coherent as it effectively illustrates the impact of medical advice on patient psychology, aligning with the overall theme of self-mastery and autosuggestion presented in the book.
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: The effectiveness of the statement depends on the acceptance of the theory that psychological influence can positively affect health outcomes and that medical professionals can leverage this through positive communication.
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: If it were proven that psychological influence has negligible impact on physical health, the statement could be misleading by overemphasizing the role of suggestion in medical recovery.
